title: Extracted Docs Management Service
summary: Moved shared Docs management behavior from the standalone HTTP server entrypoint into `scripts/docs/docs_management_service.py` and pointed the Local Studio Docs API adapter at that service module.
effect: Local Studio no longer depends on `scripts/docs/docs_management_server.py` for reusable Docs management behavior. The standalone server remains available only as a thin optional HTTP wrapper for debug or portable runs, while `/studio/api/docs/...` is the active Local Studio browser contract.
